{{Quote|Humans walking through the Silver Forest of Dreams could not possibly evade the spydrs. Some will surely die. It is a slow death, very painful.|[[Udin]], to [[Dengar/Legends|Dengar]]|<ref name="Missions 6" />}}
The '''Silver Forest of Dreams''' was a [[Forest/Legends|forest]] located on the planet [[Kubindi/Legends|Kubindi]] that was made up of kilometer-tall silver trees that had 20-meter-wide leaves. During the fall, the leaves would fall to the ground and looked like giant rafts. A mist would shroud the forest which would reduce visibility. While difficult to navigate, the area was said to be beautiful from above, where it had the appearance of a huge field of glass shards caressed by a soft, diffusing mist.

The forest was home to many [[ghost spider]]s, which made traveling through it dangerous because of the many webs woven between the trees.

The place was rumored to be a [[Vergence/Legends|nexus]] for the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]].
